AWS Hackathon 2026 - Free Bedrock Credits for All Participants
Join the biggest AWS hackathon of 2026 and receive $10,000 in free Bedrock credits. Build innovative GenAI applications and compete for prizes.

Azure AI Workshop - Free Credits for Participants
Microsoft Azure is hosting a free AI workshop with $5,000 in Azure OpenAI credits per team. Register now for the 2026 spring session.

GCP Cloud Hack 2026 - Free Google Cloud Credits
Google Cloud is offering $2,000 in free credits for participants of the GCP Cloud Hack 2026. Submit your project by June 30.

AWS Hackathon 2026 - Duplicate Entry
This is a duplicate result with the same URL to test deduplication logic.
